name: OCLL
description: Orient Corners of the Last Layer — 7 cases. After edges are oriented (yellow cross), orient all 4 corners so the entire top face is yellow. Used as step 2 of 2-look OLL.

algorithms.name: Sune (1 Corner Oriented)
algorithms.notation: R U R' U R U2 R'
algorithms.setup: Hold so the single oriented corner is at front-left. You will see headlights (two matching stickers) on the left side.

algorithms.name: Anti-Sune (1 Corner Oriented)
algorithms.notation: R U2 R' U' R U' R'
algorithms.setup: Hold so the single oriented corner is at front-right. No headlights visible — stickers look scattered.

algorithms.name: H / Double Sune (0 Corners, No Headlights)
algorithms.notation: R U2 R' U' R U R' U' R U' R'

alternatives.notation: R U R' U R U' R' U R U2 R'

algorithms.setup: No headlights on any side (no two matching corner stickers next to each other on any face). All 4 corners unoriented.

algorithms.name: Pi (0 Corners, With Headlights)
algorithms.notation: F R U R' U' R U R' U' F'

alternatives.notation: R U2 R2 U' R2 U' R2 U2 R

algorithms.setup: One side has headlights (two matching corner stickers). Hold headlights facing you (front). All 4 corners unoriented.

algorithms.name: U / Headlights (2 Diagonal Corners)
algorithms.notation: R2 D R' U2 R D' R' U2 R'

alternatives.notation: r U R' U' r' F R F'
alternatives.note: Uses wide r move — faster once learned

alternatives.notation: R' F R B' R' F' R B

algorithms.setup: Two diagonally opposite corners are oriented (yellow on top). Hold so one oriented corner is at front-right. Headlights on left and right sides.

algorithms.name: T / Bowtie (2 Adjacent Corners)
algorithms.notation: F R' F' R U R U' R'

alternatives.notation: F' r U R' U' r' F R
alternatives.note: Uses wide r move — faster once learned

alternatives.notation: R U R' U' R' F R F'

algorithms.setup: Two adjacent corners are oriented. Hold them at the back. Front-left and front-right corners are unoriented.

algorithms.name: L / Chameleon (2 Adjacent Corners, Mirror)
algorithms.notation: R U2 R' U' R U' R'

alternatives.notation: R U R' U R U2 R'
alternatives.note: Sune — same case with different AUF

algorithms.setup: Two adjacent corners oriented, forming an L with yellow on top. Can be solved with Sune or Anti-Sune after AUF, but recognizing this case directly is faster. Hold oriented corners at back-left.
